name: xpersona-playground
description: Binary IDE for generating portable starter bundles from VS Code.

xpersona.binary.baseApiUrl.description: Base URL for the Binary IDE API. Use http://localhost:3000 for local development.

enumDescriptions: Use the hosted Binary IDE API with the default OpenHands profile while preserving the legacy runtime key for compatibility.
Use the hosted Binary IDE API with the shared agentic coding orchestrator (OpenHands).
Use the hosted Binary IDE API with the Qwen-flavored OpenHands profile while preserving the legacy runtime key for compatibility.
xpersona.binary.runtime.description: Compatibility runtime selector for hosted OpenHands orchestration profiles.

xpersona.binary.agent.modelAlias.description: Hosted model alias (or raw model id matching lib/playground/model-registry). Resolved on the server and passed to OpenHands; change PLAYGROUND_MODEL_REGISTRY_JSON on the server to add models without code changes.

xpersona.binary.agent.rollbackLocalRunti.description: Legacy rollback flag retained for compatibility with older settings and migration paths.

xpersona.binary.cutie.model.description: Legacy fallback for agent.modelAlias when unset. The hosted Binary IDE profile resolves models on the server (PLAYGROUND_DEFAULT_MODEL / PLAYGROUND_MODEL_REGISTRY_JSON).

xpersona.binary.qwen.model.description: Legacy model name for the local Qwen Code runtime. Also used as a migration fallback when agent.modelAlias is unset.

xpersona.binary.qwen.baseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL for the Binary IDE backend. Defaults to the local Xpersona proxy.

xpersona.binary.qwen.executable.description: Optional path or command for a custom Qwen Code executable. Leave empty to use the SDK-bundled CLI.

xpersona.binary.qwen.cliWrapper.description: Use CLI wrapper to avoid path leak into model context. Experimental; may cause 'CLI process exited with code 1'.
